subcodes.first_line: Upon you, O resplendent stars, radiant moons, and shining suns, be greetings and praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیکم ایها النجوم الزاهره و البدور الباهره و الشموس الساطعه التحیه و الثناء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @knowledge; recognition of God, @visitation Tablets, @love of God, @eulogies; reminiscences
